metabolic_gate: Generalized Reactivity: Species concentrations modulate the global Feed (F) and Kill (k) rates when exceeding their thresholds.
visc_u: U Viscosity (α | δ): How strongly U slows its own diffusion (α) or V's diffusion (δ).
visc_v: V Viscosity (β | γ): How strongly V slows its own diffusion (β) or U's diffusion (γ).
advection: Advective Tugging (Kuu | Kvv): Species gradients induce self-advection, pulling concentrations into sharper structures.
cross_advection: Cross Tugging (Kvu | Kuv): Interaction where one species gradient induces advective motion in the other.
thermal_noise: Stochastic perturbations: Adds random fluctuations to species concentrations each step to test system stability.
